name: blockade-recon
summary: Repository indexing entry for the ``blockade-recon`` project. Index entry in the KFIOSA catalog. Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner. Attribution and provenance only; audit code, releases, and licence before use in the lab or production environment.
algorithms: passive monitor-mode frame capture via tcpdump
OUI/manufacturer tally via bundled manuf lookup table
produces: tally of observed MAC addresses grouped by manufacturer/vendor
novelty: minimal — wraps tcpdump for passive capture plus an OUI/manufacturer tally layer with session persistence. The OUI-enrichment+client-enumeration concept overlaps KFIOSA's existing airodump-ng/scapy baseline; the only mildly distinctive feature is the vendor-grouped persistent tally, which is essentially a thin OUI-enrichment+client_enum convenience wrapper rather than new recon logic.

trust.warning: External community repo. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use. Catalogued for the AI's awareness; novel algorithms are implemented in core/modules/catalog_recon.py, not shelled out to this repo's binaries.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
